title: Wokwi LED Game
summary: A simple LED reaction game to showcase the use of C/C++ for embedded systems.
description: This repository showcases a simple and educational LED reaction game implemented in C/C++ for embedded microcontrollers. The game requires the user to press a button at the exact moment a moving LED light aligns with a specific target LED, demonstrating basic hardware interaction, timing, and logical flows within the Wokwi ecosystem.
